creator: tobez@tobez.org
text:
You noted that you rebuilt perl yourself and that the error could not be
reproduced.  What is the possibility that your custom-built perl used
newer Berkeley DB (version 2 or 3)?

According to the stacktrace of the coredump, this is a problem with
Berkeley DB 1.

Cheers,
=Anton.
-- 
May the tuna salad be with you.
